quote.en: Nace took our rough idea for an automated cocktail dispenser and delivered a working, printed build that just worked at our launch event. Clear updates the whole way through.
quote.sl: Nace je iz naše grobe ideje za samodejni dozirnik koktajlov naredil delujočo, natisnjeno napravo, ki je na dogodku brezhibno delovala. Ves čas jasne posodobitve.
